completed_work: Added L0 store loading and deterministic rough token-cost estimation in prompt_context.py.
Added explicit L0 deduplication and not_found/over_budget dropped reasons.
Extended provider_context_summary_payload and format_provider_context_summary_json with include_l0 and l0_store.
Added focused tests for prompt_context, ask_provider, and compare_providers.
key_decisions: Keep this slice read-only and dry-run JSON only; do not alter rendered context packs or final prompts.
Expose explicit L0 records through l0_candidates, l0_included, and l0_dropped in schema_version v1 summary JSON.
next_actions: Consider the next smallest slice: either actual explicit L0 context-pack inclusion or L0 JSON/schema validation hardening, depending on provider comparison.
risks: Token cost is a deterministic rough word-count estimate, not tokenizer-exact accounting.
L0 visibility is not yet actual context-pack or prompt inclusion.
summary_text: AI-Lab added read-only explicit L0 inclusion visibility to provider latest-context dry-run JSON summaries. prompt_context now loads L0 chunk summary JSON records from an L0 store, estimates rough token cost deterministically, deduplicates explicit chunk ids, reports missing chunks as not_found, admits chunks against the L0 budget bucket when --context-window is provided, and emits l0_candidates, l0_included, and l0_dropped in schema_version v1 JSON summaries. ask_provider.py and compare_providers.py now support --include-l0 and --l0-store for --print-context-summary --summary-format json. This is read-only summary visibility only and does not alter rendered context packs or final prompts. Smoke test using create_l0_chunk.py produced valid l0_* JSON output; full suite passed with 224 tests.
